description: Goal: close the fact-readiness mini-epic only after the new evidence/partition model is documented, observable, and old concepts are mechanically absent. Signal: cargo test --lib compiler2:: passes; fact-engine, semantic-fixpoint, type-specialization, telemetry, and guide-facing docs describe current/settled evidence, ActivationInputs, activation partition keys, ReturnEvidence, and any/none semantics accurately; telemetry exposes readiness and frontier movement without giant payload logs. Strategy: update docs after code/tests prove the model, add or run no-go searches for semantic_closure_is_current, DependencySnapshot, ReturnType-as-ready-Ty, ActivationKey-as-body-input, recursive-only key widening, list-only convergence_class, raw closure-capture key defaults, outputs Vec<(FactKey,bool)>, missing-return-as-none, unresolved-as-any, stale FactValue::Inputs docs, and telemetry full-payload budget leaks. Any survivor requires deletion here or a new blocking ticket. Outro: no stale docs, no scaffolding, no compatibility shim preserving old key semantics, and no unbounded fz2 telemetry run as an accepted workflow.
title: Compiler2 fact readiness closeout: docs telemetry and deletion contract
